headline: Alfie Osborne
body: 🚨🔵 Exclusive: Chelsea agree deal to sign 17 year old talented centre back Alfie Osborne from Hearts. 🏴󠁧󠁢󠁳󠁣󠁴󠁿 Scotland U19 centre back accepted the proposal and completed his medical, signing a long term contract. Osborne picked CFC ahead of offers from more clubs across Europe.
raw_text:
🚨🔵 Exclusive: Chelsea agree deal to sign 17 year old talented centre back Alfie Osborne from Hearts. 🏴󠁧󠁢󠁳󠁣󠁴󠁿

Scotland U19 centre back accepted the proposal and completed his medical, signing a long term contract.

Osborne picked #CFC ahead of offers from more clubs across Europe.
